neutral.text: Ain't nothing wrong with a little consistency.

choices.text: Wouldn't kill to have a little excitement here.

friendly.text: Sun shinin', air is clean, and my drone's coming in today.

friendly_next.text: If you see it outside ther', go on and bring to the office.

personal.text: Sleeps' the easiest part of your day.

choices.text: Dreams a bit more vivid than usual
I would have thought the same.

dreams.text: Most folks feel that way after living here for a bit.

greeting_return.text: Well, go on and watch the till.

end.text: 'bout time to start the day now. I'll talk to you later
